# MelodyOne

MelodyOne is a music streaming web app. Users search for YouTube tracks and stream high-quality audio. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Flask, yt-dlp, and PostgreSQL.

## Key Features
- YouTube audio search and streaming
- User playlists and favorites
- PWA installable on mobile/desktop

## Tech Stack
- Frontend: Next.js 15, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Zustand
- Backend: Flask, yt-dlp
- Database: Neon PostgreSQL, Drizzle ORM
- Cache: Upstash Redis
- Auth: Clerk
- Storage: Backblaze B2, Cloudinary

## Links
- Website: https://melodyone.vercel.app

## Author
Shubham Raj — Full-Stack Developer & Music Enthusiast
